gaps: The ranged corpus remote was unreachable, so citation-matched resolved priors could not be retrieved.
The provisioned documents did not include the petitioner's reply, which would have helped assess the BIO's mootness and alternative-ground objections.
helpful: The provisioned petition, questions presented, BIO, and dated docket snapshot exposed both the cert merits and the vehicle defects.
The committed statpack supplied a paid-petition base rate.
CourtListener opinion search verified representative decisions on both sides of the circuit split.
notes: The corpus query was attempted but failed before returning any priors. The repeated conference distributions in the snapshot were the strongest case-specific signal.
